position: First element of the response line (three-digit numeric code)
explanation: Three-digit numeric reply code used by FTP servers to distinguish response types (as defined in RFC959 and extended by the other listed RFCs).

position: Most significant digit of the three-digit reply code
explanation: The first digit classifies the reply category (e.g., positive preliminary, positive completion, positive intermediate, transient negative, permanent negative). RFC2228 also defines '6yz' as protected replies.
